name: Medical Emergency
description: Reports involving sudden illness, serious symptoms, injuries, or patients needing medical assessment, ambulance response, or first aid support.

name: Flood
description: Flooding incidents affecting roads, homes, structures, or residents, including water depth, missing persons, and possible evacuation needs.

name: Earthquake
description: Earthquake-related impacts such as damaged structures, blocked roads, trapped persons, and households needing rescue or assessment.

name: Landslide
description: Slope failure or soil collapse affecting roads, structures, or residents, including missing persons and evacuation requirements.

name: Rescue
description: General rescue requests where people are trapped, stranded, injured, or otherwise need extraction or immediate responder assistance.

name: Road Accident
description: Road crashes involving vehicles, pedestrians, injuries, blocked access, or traffic hazards requiring response and documentation.

name: Home Intrusion
description: Unauthorized entry or attempted entry into a home or property, including possible suspects, victims, or security concerns.

name: Robbery
description: Theft or hold-up incidents involving property loss, threats, suspects, victims, or immediate police/security response needs.

name: Missing Person
description: Reports of a person whose whereabouts are unknown and may require search, verification, or coordinated responder follow-up.

name: Domestic Violence
description: Violence or threats within a household or intimate/family relationship requiring safety response, medical support, or referral.

name: Infrastructure Damage
description: Damage affecting public assets, facilities, utilities, roads, bridges, or other infrastructure that may disrupt access or services.

name: Power Outage
description: Electric service interruption or power-related disruption affecting households, facilities, roads, or critical services.

name: Water Supply Issue
description: Water service interruption, low supply, contamination concern, or other water utility issue affecting residents or facilities.

name: Animal Attack
description: Animal bite, attack, or aggressive animal incident that may require medical care, capture, or public safety response.

name: Kidnapping
description: Abduction or suspected kidnapping involving victims, suspects, vehicles, or urgent law-enforcement coordination.

name: Carnapping
description: Stolen or forcibly taken vehicle report, including vehicle details, plate number, color, and possible suspect information.

name: Building/House Fire
description: Fire affecting a house, building, or other structure, including fire size, structure type, and firefighting resource needs.

name: Vehichle Fire
description: Fire involving a vehicle, including vehicle type, road blockage, and firefighting or traffic control needs.

name: Riot
description: Public disorder involving groups, unrest, or crowd-related disturbance requiring security, medical, or traffic support.

name: Bomb Threat
description: Threat or suspected explosive hazard requiring immediate security assessment, evacuation consideration, and coordinated response.

name: Others
description: Reports that do not fit the standard incident categories and need free-form details for triage and routing.
